question_text: A student builds a circuit with a switch that is in the 'open' position. What would you expect to observe?

options.label: A
options.text: The bulb would be very dim but still lit

options.label: B
options.text: The bulb would not light up because the circuit is broken

options.label: C
options.text: The voltage would increase across the bulb

options.label: D
options.text: The current would flow backwards through the circuit

explanation: When a switch is open, it creates a gap in the circuit that breaks the complete path. Without a complete path, current cannot flow, so no power reaches the bulb and it does not light up at all.
